artPrompt: A widescreen film-still of an ominous ongoing spell over a rioting town square at night, ghostly goblin voters rising as glowing embers from the bonfire-lit chaos and re-forming endlessly above the crowd, fresh figures coalescing from sparks; overturned ballot boxes, drifting confetti, and torn blank bunting below, flame orange light against night-black smoke, an unkillable self-renewing tide, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Incumbent Advantage
text:
Whenever a Voter you control dies, roll a six-sided die. On a 5 or 6, create a 1/1 red Voter creature token, because somebody always re-registers.
Mandate — As long as you control four or more Voters, Voters you control can't be blocked by creatures with greater power. (You're the incumbent. Nobody bigger gets in your way.)
flavorText: The fine print was written by the Mayor, for the Mayor, about the Mayor.
